## 1. Meeting Cost Calculator 💰
**Tagline:** See how much your meetings actually cost

**Copy this into Lovely.dev:**
```jsx
export default function App() {
  const [attendees, setAttendees] = React.useState(5);
  const [avgRate, setAvgRate] = React.useState(75);
  const [hours, setHours] = React.useState(1);
  const totalCost = attendees * avgRate * hours;
  const yearlyCost = totalCost * 5 * 52;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-100 flex items-center justify-center p-8">
      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 max-w-lg w-full">
        <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold text-indigo-900 mb-2">${totalCost}</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-500 mb-6">per meeting</p>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Attendees</label>
            <input type="number" value={attendees} onChange={e => setAttendees(+e.target.value)} 
              className="w-full p-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-lg font-semibold" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide">$/Hour</label>
            <input type="number" value={avgRate} onChange={e => setAvgRate(+e.target.value)} 
              className="w-full p-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-lg font-semibold" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Hours</label>
            <input type="number" value={hours} onChange={e => setHours(+e.target.value)} step="0.5" 
              className="w-full p-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-lg font-semibold" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-indigo-50 rounded-xl p-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-indigo-600 font-medium">Yearly cost (5 meetings/week)</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-indigo-900">${yearlyCost.toLocaleString()}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

**Monetization:** Freemium ($5/month for export to PDF)

## 2. Cold Email Validator ✉️
**Tagline:** Check if your cold email will get read

**Copy this into Lovely.dev:**
```jsx
export default function App() {
  const [subject, setSubject] = React.useState('');
  const [body, setBody] = React.useState('');
  
  const scoreEmail = () => {
    let score = 50;
    if (subject.length < 20 || subject.length > 60) score -= 15;
    if (body.includes('[Name]')) score -= 20;
    if (body.match(/call|meeting|schedule/i)) score += 20;
    const words = body.split(' ').length;
    if (words < 50 || words > 200) score -= 10;
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));
  };

  const score = subject ? scoreEmail() : 0;
  const color = score >= 70 ? 'text-green-600' : score >= 50 ? 'text-yellow-600' : 'text-red-600';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-2">Cold Email Score</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-500 mb-6">Get a score out of 100 for your email</p>
        
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow p-6 mb-4">
          <label className="text-sm text-gray-500">Subject Line</label>
          <input type="text" value={subject} onChange={e => setSubject(e.target.value)} 
            placeholder="Quick question about staffing..." 
            className="w-full p-3 border rounded-lg text-lg" />
        </div>
        
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow p-6 mb-4">
          <label className="text-sm text-gray-500">Email Body</label>
          <textarea value={body} onChange={e => setBody(e.target.value)} 
            placeholder="Hi [Name], ..." className="w-full p-3 border rounded-lg h-40" />
        </div>
        
        {score > 0 && (
          <div className={`text-center p-8 rounded-xl ${score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-100' : score >= 50 ? 'bg-yellow-100' : 'bg-red-100'}`}>
            <p className={`text-6xl font-bold ${color}`}>{score}</p>
            <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">/ 100</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

**Monetization:** $19/month for unlimited checks + tips

## 3. Startup Metrics Dashboard 📊
**Tagline:** MRR, Churn, LTV, CAC - all in one place

**Copy this into Lovely.dev:**
```jsx
export default function App() {
  const [metrics, setMetrics] = React.useState({
    mrr: 12500,
    churn: 2.3,
    ltv: 890,
    cac: 120,
    activeCustomers: 342,
  });

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Metrics Dashboard</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-500 mb-8">Your startup at a glance</p>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          {[
            { label: 'MRR', value: `$${metrics.mrr.toLocaleString()}`, color: 'bg-green-500' },
            { label: 'Churn', value: `${metrics.churn}%`, color: metrics.churn > 5 ? 'bg-red-500' : 'bg-green-500' },
            { label: 'LTV', value: `$${metrics.ltv}`, color: 'bg-blue-500' },
            { label: 'CAC', value: `$${metrics.cac}`, color: 'bg-purple-500' },
          ].map((stat, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow p-6">
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm uppercase tracking-wide">{stat.label}</p>
              <p className="text-3xl font-bold mt-1">{stat.value}</p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow p-6">
          <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-4">Quick Actions</h3>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <button className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg text-indigo-700 font-medium hover:bg-indigo-100">
              Export Report
            </button>
            <button className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg text-indigo-700 font-medium hover:bg-indigo-100">
              Connect Stripe
            </button>
            <button className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg text-indigo-700 font-medium hover:bg-indigo-100">
              Add Team Member
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

**Monetization:** Free < $10K MRR, $29/month above

## 4. Idea Validator Scorecard 🎯
**Tagline:** Answer 10 questions. Get a startup score.

**Copy this into Lovely.dev:**
```jsx
export default function App() {
  const [step, setStep] = React.useState(0);
  const [answers, setAnswers] = React.useState({});
  
  const questions = [
    'Who is this for? (specific person)',
    'What problem do they have?',
    'How do they solve it today?',
    'How much does this cost them?',
    'How do you find these people?',
    'How big is the problem? (1-10)',
    "What's your unfair advantage?",
    "What's the simplest version?",
    'How will you make money?',
    "What's the one metric that matters?",
  ];
  
  const calculateScore = () => {
    let score = 50;
    if (answers[0]?.length > 10) score += 10; // Specific person
    if (answers[3]?.includes('$')) score += 10; // Knows cost
    if (answers[5] > 7) score += 15; // Big problem
    if (answers[8]?.includes('$')) score += 15; // Has revenue model
    return Math.min(100, score);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-100 p-8">
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
        {!answers.q10 ? (
          <>
            <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8">
              <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
                <span className="text-gray-400">Question {step + 1} of 10</span>
                <span className="text-indigo-600 font-medium">{Math.round((step/10)*100)}%</span>
              </div>
              <div className="w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2 mb-8">
                <div className="bg-indigo-600 h-2 rounded-full" style={{width: `${(step/10)*100}%`}} />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">{questions[step]}</h2>
              <textarea 
                value={answers[`q${step}`] || ''} 
                onChange={e => setAnswers({...answers, [`q${step}`]: e.target.value})}
                className="w-full p-4 border rounded-xl h-32 text-lg"
                placeholder="Your answer..."
              />
              <div className="flex gap-4 mt-6">
                {step > 0 && (
                  <button onClick={() => setStep(step-1)} className="px-6 py-3 border rounded-xl">Back</button>
                )}
                {step < 9 ? (
                  <button onClick={() => setStep(step+1)} className="px-6 py-3 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl">Next</button>
                ) : (
                  <button onClick={() => setAnswers({...answers, q10: 'done'})} className="px-6 py-3 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-xl">Get Score</button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 text-center">
            <p className="text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm">Your Idea Score</p>
            <p className="text-7xl font-bold text-indigo-600 my-6">{calculateScore()}</p>
            <p className="text-gray-500">out of 100</p>
            <div className="mt-8 text-left bg-green-50 rounded-xl p-4">
              <p className="font-semibold text-green-800">What's working:</p>
              {answers.q0?.length > 10 && <p className="text-green-700">✓ Specific target audience</p>}
              {answers.q5 > 7 && <p className="text-green-700">✓ Big problem identified</p>}
              {answers.q8?.includes('$') && <p className="text-green-700">✓ Revenue model defined</p>}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

**Monetization:** $9 one-time or free with ads
